title: Define Keyboard Translation Table Library
text: Define Keyboard Translation Table Library Use this editor to define or modify keyboard translation tables. The keyboard translation tables supplied with Uniface are in the library USYS. At installation time, compiled versions of these tables are located in USYS:usys.uar . Note: You must import libktt.usys.xml from the /uniface/misc directory of your installation before you can copy or modify translation tables. Fields Description Definition How to Define a New Translation Table Related Links Keyboard Translation Tables A keyboard translation table maps a sequence of input codes received from a keyboard or database to logical function codes and characters recognized by Uniface. Database Translation Tables Database translation tables convert character strings during database input or output. This makes it possible to display characters stored in the database that are normally not visible (such as typesetting codes), or to store a key entered in a field as another string.
